---
title: "Course Popularity Overview (AY2420-AY2520)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

```{r}
# Core packages and shared cleaning helpers used by existing AY notebooks.
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)
source("phdmodel_test_helpers.R")

sem_levels <- c("AY2420", "AY2510", "AY2520")
data_dir <- "../data/phdModel"
```

## Build Semester Inputs

```{r}
# Expand to one first-choice event per student.
# NIL/NA/no-entry are kept as a single "UNRANKED" category.
canonical_course <- function(code) {
  code <- norm_code(code)
  if_else(str_detect(code, "/"), str_extract(code, "^[^/]+"), code)
}

build_first_choice_events <- function(preference, courses, semester, match_fun = NULL) {
  map_course <- function(code) {
    if (is.null(match_fun)) match(code, courses) else match_fun(code, courses)
  }
  no_pref_tokens <- c("", "NIL", "NA", "-")

  purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(preference)), function(i) {
    first <- norm_code(preference$first[i])
    sid <- as.integer(preference$`S/No.`[i])
    yr <- as.integer(preference$seniority[i])
    first <- if (is.na(first) || first %in% no_pref_tokens) NA_character_ else first

    if (is.na(first)) {
      tibble(
        semester = semester,
        student_id = sid,
        seniority = yr,
        course_code = "UNRANKED",
        first_choice_flag = 1L
      )
    } else {
      j <- map_course(first)
      if (is.na(j)) {
        tibble(
          semester = semester,
          student_id = sid,
          seniority = yr,
          course_code = "UNRANKED",
          first_choice_flag = 1L
        )
      } else {
        tibble(
          semester = semester,
          student_id = sid,
          seniority = yr,
          course_code = canonical_course(courses[j]),
          first_choice_flag = 1L
        )
      }
    }
  })
}

prepare_ay2420 <- function() {
  reference_date <- ymd("2025-05-01")

  preference_y24_raw <- read_excel(
    file.path(data_dir, "AY2420", "List of research scholars and teaching preferences for Sem 2 AY2425.xlsx"),
    sheet = "List of RS ( Yr 2-4 )",
    skip = 2,
    range = "B4:O37"
  )
  preference_y1_raw <- read_excel(
    file.path(data_dir, "AY2420", "List of research scholars and teaching preferences for Sem 2 AY2425.xlsx"),
    sheet = "List of RS ( Yr 1 )",
    skip = 2
  )
  demand_raw <- read_excel(
    file.path(data_dir, "AY2420", "2425_Sem2_tutor_grader_request_working.xlsx"),
    sheet = 1
  )

  preference_y24 <- preference_y24_raw %>%
    filter(!is.na(`S/No.`)) %>%
    transmute(
      `S/No._raw` = as.integer(`S/No.`),
      Name,
      `Year (intake enrolled in)` = as.character(`Year (intake enrolled in)`),
      first = clean_pref_code(`Please provide the module code which is your first tutorial preferences (with 1 being most preferred) (first choice)`),
      second = clean_pref_code(`Please list the module code which is your second tutorial preferences (second choice)`),
      third = clean_pref_code(`Please list the module code which is your third tutorial preferences (Third choice)`),
      intake_month = case_when(
        str_detect(str_to_lower(`Year (intake enrolled in)`), "jan") ~ 1L,
        str_detect(str_to_lower(`Year (intake enrolled in)`), "aug") ~ 8L,
        TRUE ~ NA_integer_
      ),
      intake_year = as.integer(str_extract(`Year (intake enrolled in)`, "\\d{4}")),
      intake_date = ymd(paste(intake_year, intake_month, "01")),
      source_sheet = "Yr2-4"
    )

  preference_y1 <- preference_y1_raw %>%
    filter(!is.na(`S/No.`)) %>%
    mutate(
      intake_date = as.Date(`Year (intake enrolled in)`),
      intake_date = coalesce(intake_date, ymd("2024-08-01"))
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      `S/No._raw` = as.integer(`S/No.`),
      Name,
      `Year (intake enrolled in)` = as.character(intake_date),
      first = NA_character_,
      second = NA_character_,
      third = NA_character_,
      intake_month = month(intake_date),
      intake_year = year(intake_date),
      intake_date,
      source_sheet = "Yr1"
    )

  preference <- bind_rows(preference_y24, preference_y1) %>%
    mutate(
      year_raw = time_length(interval(intake_date, reference_date), "years"),
      seniority = pmin(ceiling(year_raw), 4L),
      Name = standardise_name(Name)
    ) %>%
    arrange(source_sheet, `S/No._raw`, Name) %>%
    mutate(`S/No.` = row_number()) %>%
    relocate(`S/No.`, .before = Name)

  demand_cols <- tail(names(demand_raw), 2)
  demand <- demand_raw %>%
    transmute(
      course_code = norm_code(`Course Code`),
      TA = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[demand_cols[1]]])),
      GR = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[demand_cols[2]]])) / 11
    ) %>%
    mutate(TA = replace_na(TA, 0), GR = replace_na(GR, 0), E = 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(course_code), course_code != "", TA + GR > 0) %>%
    arrange(course_code) %>%
    mutate(ID = row_number()) %>%
    relocate(ID, .before = course_code)

  # Keep the same AY2420 demand adjustments used in current testing workflow.
  demand$TA[7] <- demand$TA[7] - 5
  demand$TA[10] <- demand$TA[10] - 7
  demand$TA[5] <- demand$TA[5] - 11

  courses <- norm_code(pull(demand, course_code))

  match_course <- function(code, courses) {
    code <- norm_code(code)
    j <- match(code, courses)
    if (!is.na(j)) return(j)
    starts <- which(str_starts(courses, paste0(code, "/")))
    if (length(starts) == 1) return(starts[[1]])
    NA_integer_
  }

  list(preference = preference, courses = courses, match_fun = match_course)
}

prepare_ay2510 <- function() {
  reference_date <- ymd("2025-12-01")

  preference_y24_raw <- read_excel(
    file.path(data_dir, "AY2510", "List of research scholars and teaching preferences for Sem 1, AY202526.xlsx"),
    sheet = "List of RS ( Yr 2-4 )",
    skip = 2
  )
  preference_y1_raw <- read_excel(
    file.path(data_dir, "AY2510", "List of research scholars and teaching preferences for Sem 1, AY202526.xlsx"),
    sheet = "List of RS ( Yr 1 )",
    skip = 2
  )
  manual_output_current <- read_excel(file.path(data_dir, "AY2510", "output_005.xlsx"), sheet = "Sheet3")

  preference_y24 <- preference_y24_raw %>%
    filter(!is.na(`S/No.`)) %>%
    transmute(
      `S/No._raw` = as.integer(`S/No.`),
      Name,
      `Year (intake enrolled in)` = as.character(`Year (intake enrolled in)`),
      first = clean_pref_code(`Please provide the module code which is your first tutorial preferences (with 1 being most preferred) (first choice)`),
      second = clean_pref_code(`Please list the module code which is your second tutorial preferences (second choice)`),
      third = clean_pref_code(`Please list the module code which is your third tutorial preferences (Third choice)`),
      intake_month = case_when(
        str_detect(str_to_lower(`Year (intake enrolled in)`), "jan") ~ 1L,
        str_detect(str_to_lower(`Year (intake enrolled in)`), "aug") ~ 8L,
        TRUE ~ NA_integer_
      ),
      intake_year = as.integer(str_extract(`Year (intake enrolled in)`, "\\d{4}")),
      intake_date = ymd(paste(intake_year, intake_month, "01")),
      source_sheet = "Yr2-4"
    )

  preference_y1 <- preference_y1_raw %>%
    filter(!is.na(`S/No.`)) %>%
    mutate(intake_date = as.Date(`Year (intake enrolled in)`)) %>%
    transmute(
      `S/No._raw` = as.integer(`S/No.`),
      Name,
      `Year (intake enrolled in)` = as.character(intake_date),
      first = NA_character_,
      second = NA_character_,
      third = NA_character_,
      intake_month = month(intake_date),
      intake_year = year(intake_date),
      intake_date,
      source_sheet = "Yr1"
    )

  preference <- bind_rows(preference_y24, preference_y1) %>%
    mutate(
      year_raw = time_length(interval(intake_date, reference_date), "years"),
      seniority = pmin(ceiling(year_raw), 4L),
      Name = standardise_name(Name)
    ) %>%
    arrange(source_sheet, `S/No._raw`, Name) %>%
    mutate(`S/No.` = row_number()) %>%
    relocate(`S/No.`, .before = Name)

  demand_source <- manual_output_current %>%
    filter(str_detect(email, "@"), !is.na(Name)) %>%
    mutate(name_std = standardise_name(Name))

  demand_ta_cols <- names(demand_source)[str_detect(names(demand_source), "-t$")]
  demand_gr_cols <- names(demand_source)[str_detect(names(demand_source), "-g$")]

  demand_allocatable <- demand_source %>% filter(name_std != "WONG YEAN LING")

  demand_ta <- demand_allocatable %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(demand_ta_cols), ~ sum(as.numeric(.x), na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "course_col", values_to = "TA") %>%
    transmute(course_code = norm_code(str_remove(course_col, "-t$")), TA = replace_na(as.numeric(TA), 0))

  demand_gr <- demand_allocatable %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(demand_gr_cols), ~ sum(as.numeric(.x), na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "course_col", values_to = "GR") %>%
    transmute(course_code = norm_code(str_remove(course_col, "-g$")), GR = replace_na(as.numeric(GR), 0))

  demand <- full_join(demand_ta, demand_gr, by = "course_code") %>%
    mutate(TA = replace_na(TA, 0), GR = replace_na(GR, 0), E = 0) %>%
    filter(TA + GR > 0) %>%
    arrange(course_code)

  courses <- norm_code(pull(demand, course_code))

  list(preference = preference, courses = courses, match_fun = NULL)
}

prepare_ay2520 <- function() {
  reference_date <- ymd("2026-05-01")

  preference <- read_excel(file.path(data_dir, "AY2520", "preference.xlsx"), range = "B4:O44")
  demand <- read_excel(file.path(data_dir, "AY2520", "demand.xlsx"))

  preference <- preference %>%
    mutate(
      intake_month = case_when(
        str_detect(`Year (intake enrolled in)`, "Jan") ~ 1,
        str_detect(`Year (intake enrolled in)`, "Aug") ~ 8,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      intake_year = as.integer(str_extract(`Year (intake enrolled in)`, "\\d{4}")),
      intake_date = ymd(paste(intake_year, intake_month, "01")),
      year_raw = time_length(interval(intake_date, reference_date), "years"),
      seniority = ceiling(year_raw),
      Name = standardise_name(Name)
    ) %>%
    rename(first = 9, second = 10, third = 11) %>%
    mutate(
      first = clean_pref_code(first),
      second = clean_pref_code(second),
      third = clean_pref_code(third)
    ) %>%
    arrange(`S/No.`)

  demand <- demand %>%
    rename(TA = ta_hours, GR = grading_hours) %>%
    mutate(E = numeric(n())) %>%
    arrange(ID)

  demand$TA[norm_code(demand$course_code) == "ST2334"] <- demand$TA[norm_code(demand$course_code) == "ST2334"] - 8
  demand$TA[norm_code(demand$course_code) == "ST1131"] <- demand$TA[norm_code(demand$course_code) == "ST1131"] - 5

  courses <- norm_code(pull(demand, course_code))

  list(preference = preference, courses = courses, match_fun = NULL)
}
```

## First-Choice Table

```{r}
# Build student-level first-choice events for each semester.
ay2420 <- prepare_ay2420()
ay2510 <- prepare_ay2510()
ay2520 <- prepare_ay2520()

first_choice_tbl <- bind_rows(
  build_first_choice_events(ay2420$preference, ay2420$courses, "AY2420", ay2420$match_fun),
  build_first_choice_events(ay2510$preference, ay2510$courses, "AY2510", ay2510$match_fun),
  build_first_choice_events(ay2520$preference, ay2520$courses, "AY2520", ay2520$match_fun)
) %>%
  mutate(semester = factor(semester, levels = sem_levels))

course_pop <- first_choice_tbl %>%
  count(semester, course_code, wt = first_choice_flag, name = "n_first")

year_pop <- first_choice_tbl %>%
  count(semester, seniority, course_code, wt = first_choice_flag, name = "n_first")

course_pop_rankable <- course_pop %>%
  filter(course_code != "UNRANKED")

all_courses_tbl <- bind_rows(
  tibble(semester = "AY2420", course_code = canonical_course(ay2420$courses)),
  tibble(semester = "AY2510", course_code = canonical_course(ay2510$courses)),
  tibble(semester = "AY2520", course_code = canonical_course(ay2520$courses))
) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(semester = factor(semester, levels = sem_levels))

course_pop_full <- all_courses_tbl %>%
  left_join(course_pop_rankable, by = c("semester", "course_code")) %>%
  mutate(n_first = replace_na(n_first, 0L))
```

## 1) Most Popular Courses

```{r}
# Use a fixed top-5 per semester for a consistent panel layout.
n_top <- 5L
tie_priority <- c("ST2131")
top_k <- course_pop_rankable %>%
  group_by(semester) %>%
  mutate(priority = if_else(course_code %in% tie_priority, 0L, 1L)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_first), priority, course_code, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = n_top) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-priority) %>%
  mutate(course_sem = paste(semester, course_code, sep = "___")) %>%
  group_by(semester) %>%
  arrange(n_first, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(course_sem = factor(course_sem, levels = course_sem)) %>%
  ungroup()

p_top10 <- ggplot(top_k, aes(y = course_sem, x = n_first, fill = semester)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~semester, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) sub("^.*___", "", x)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(top_k$n_first, na.rm = TRUE)),
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Student count", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

p_top10
```

```{r}
# Sanity check: one vote per student, with UNRANKED tracked separately.
vote_check <- first_choice_tbl %>%
  count(semester, name = "total_votes") %>%
  left_join(
    bind_rows(
      ay2420$preference %>% summarise(semester = "AY2420", students = n()),
      ay2510$preference %>% summarise(semester = "AY2510", students = n()),
      ay2520$preference %>% summarise(semester = "AY2520", students = n())
    ),
    by = "semester"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    course_pop %>%
      filter(course_code == "UNRANKED") %>%
      transmute(semester, unranked_students = n_first),
    by = "semester"
  ) %>%
  mutate(unranked_students = replace_na(unranked_students, 0))

vote_check
```

```{r}
# Brief interpretation: top ranked course per semester.
course_pop_rankable %>%
  group_by(semester) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_first), course_code, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  ungroup()
```

## 2) Popularity Consistency Across Years

```{r}
# Track popularity rank trajectory for selected core courses only.
track_courses <- c("ST2334", "ST3131", "ST2132")

rank_tbl <- course_pop_full %>%
  group_by(semester) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_first), course_code, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

rank_trend <- tidyr::crossing(
  semester = factor(sem_levels, levels = sem_levels),
  course_code = track_courses
) %>%
  left_join(
    rank_tbl %>% select(semester, course_code, rank),
    by = c("semester", "course_code")
  ) %>%
  mutate(course_code = factor(course_code, levels = track_courses)) %>%
  mutate(semester = factor(semester, levels = sem_levels))

p_rank <- ggplot(rank_trend, aes(x = semester, y = rank, color = course_code, group = course_code)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Popularity rank (1 = most popular)", color = "Course") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

p_rank
```

```{r}
# Export figures used in thesis.
thesis_fig_dir <- file.path("..", "..", "LATEX", "thesis", "figures")
dir.create(thesis_fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(thesis_fig_dir, "course_popularity_top10.pdf"),
  plot = p_top10,
  width = 9.0,
  height = 4.2
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(thesis_fig_dir, "course_popularity_rank_trend.pdf"),
  plot = p_rank,
  width = 8.6,
  height = 4.2
)
```

```{r}
# Rank change summary for the tracked courses.
rank_trend %>%
  group_by(course_code) %>%
  summarise(
    observed_ay = sum(!is.na(rank)),
    min_rank = min(rank, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_rank = max(rank, na.rm = TRUE),
    rank_range = max_rank - min_rank,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(rank_range, min_rank)
```
